title: Peaceful Times a new short film
display_title: Peaceful Times a new short film
wikitext:
[]: Peaceful Times... a new short film?             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Fri Oct 25, 2013 2:10 pm Moved to Rebuild subforum due to possibility of a connection with Rebuild. Feel free to shift this topic if it's explicitly confirmed to be an entirely different work. Pardon the messy split/merge from Final speculation thread that was already on-going. -SSD So, this mysterious post has appeared on the official Eva blog. Something about a new short film called Peaceful Times, and Megumi Hayashibara is apparently doing the narration. What could this be? Do you think it could be... *gasp*... Evangelion-related?! (Wishful thinking, I know.) Any ideas? By the way, sorry if I posted this in the wrong forum... I wasn't sure if it belonged here, or in Related Works & People, or even in the Rebuild forum, since there's so little information on exactly what this short film is.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Oct 25, 2013 2:23 pm You had my curiosity but now you have my attention.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Oct 25, 2013 3:57 pm mmmmh... it's in EVA 3.0 's official blog, the title "Peaceful Times" excludes the events of the trilogie(Angel War in 1.0 and 2.0, war against Gendo in a post-apocalyptic wasteland in 3.0) and the narration is made by Megumi Hayashibara, the seiyū of Yui and Rei... Personally I've three guesses : 1/ it will be an equivalent of episode 21, where we'll be shown Rebuild's GEHIRN, Gendo and Yui's meeting and some interesting tidbits about SEELE's plans and preparations in this continuity 2/ it happens sometimes during the time skip, the in metaphysical place Rei and Shinji ended into at the end of 2.0. Maybe they'll meet Yui who will tell them some important events for when Shinji will be reconstructed, but he won't immediately remember it, explaining why he thought that mere moments before he was still saving Rei. 3/ it actually happens during Asuka, Rei-Q and Shinji's walk in the red desert, and he's remembering more peaceful times before this whole Eva madness befell him, maybe about his early childhood when Yui was still around, or maybe of the decade he lived with his teacher. In both case, maybe we'll see the events of the Contact Experiment that were erased from Shinji's memories(in case #3 the mental shock he suffered during the movie unlocked the events of the Contact Experiment from his brain) because there must have been a reason why his memories of the events where whipped out! That's my wild guesses.

[]:             Quote Post by Noriko is my wife » Fri Oct 25, 2013 8:01 pm Director credit shared by Maeda and Higuchi. Co-produced with P Productions. The title comes from a track from the 3.0 soundtrack. Sagisu's new record uses images from the storyboard as cover. See http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2624.html So it's a promotional film for Sagisu's album? With Higuchi as the director maybe it's (part) live action.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Oct 25, 2013 8:47 pm when is this thing supposed to come out?

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Sat Oct 26, 2013 7:19 pm Does anyone have a translation to this: [url]http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2624.html[/url] Apparently, something Eva related is being released in November. Wonder if it has to do with FINAL.[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 26, 2013 9:04 pm Peaceful Times is the track that was the Next Time Preview music for Final, it's the choir version of the normal preview music. If I'm understanding this right, Peaceful Times(F02)petit film is some...thing...with narration by Hayashibara (Rei's seiyuu) that's going to premiere in the middle of November. The article isn't sure just what this is, either. I'm lost if this is a trailer for Final or maybe even a short film about the time skip or what. I'm sure we'll receive more information soon enough, so no reason for us to over-speculate just yet. I'm assuming it'll most likely be a little project related to Shiro's Songbook release, mentioned below the Peaceful Times info. EDIT: ANN Link: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2013-10-27/evangelion-khara-produces-peaceful-times-f02-petit-film

[]: Peaceful Times (F02) petit film             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Oct 26, 2013 11:37 pm Link We'll see how this goes, but I'm most curious about how the direction going to work out.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Oct 27, 2013 1:50 am So...is this supposed to be some kind of pseudo trailer for 4.0 or the events in between ha and q?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Oct 27, 2013 2:05 am I was kinda calm about this until I realized that the release is little more than two weeks away. GET HYPE, PEOPLE!!! This may be just a hunch, but I think there's a chance we'll get a release date drop for FINAL at the end of whatever this "petit film" is. ...I sincerely hope I didn't just jinx it.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Oct 27, 2013 2:11 am I really have no idea what it is, but I'm going to run along with the rest of the sheep and scream about it anyway. Besides, what else do we ever do when it comes to Eva? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Oct 27, 2013 2:15 am Maybe this thing is the reason behind Khara's hiring of those new animators. Some kind of "proving ground" project?

[]:             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Sun Oct 27, 2013 2:19 am Is it confirmed that it's Eva-related, or it's just a Khara thing?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Oct 27, 2013 5:37 am My first thought is a concert akin to the Evangelion Live Symphony, where the actors would come out every so often in between songs and perform vocals of their characters. But that's my wild speculation at work. (That, and it says "film" in the title. so..... what?) I really don't know anything more than what SSD stated above. It can't be FINAL if Studio Khara just started hiring CGI artists for their project. Even a movie with a Hollywood budget would be hard pressed to complete animation for that in just 2 weeks, even if it is tailored not to appear photorealistic. So, my curiosity is fueling my excitement at the moment. I just can't wait to see what this thing is.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Oct 27, 2013 6:06 am I hope that we at least get a release date for FINAL.....

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sun Oct 27, 2013 8:32 am I so can't wait now It will be a blast even if it's a short movie thanks anno ! hope it will not be too much 3d in it

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Oct 27, 2013 9:18 am I am excited! Comes out mid November(My birthday maybe? ) Since we don't what this is other then it being Eva related, should this thread be moved to chit-chat or rebuild forum? Kinda think it could be exposed on this form a bit more, who knows what it could be?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Oct 27, 2013 9:28 am Since it came out on the 3.0 official blog and there's a strong possibility that this is Rebuild-related, I'm moving this to the Rebuild subforum. Perhaps it will be like the "Parallel Works" for Gurren Lagann, which showed things like the beginnings of the Ganmen as lunar exploration vehicles, or Parallel Works 8 and its depiction of Lordgenome's origins. Perhaps.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Oct 27, 2013 9:46 am It's important to keep this information in mind: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/674656/Peaceful-Times-a-new-short-film/#674656 Higuchi has done plenty of live action/toku Anno has that experience too Pi Production is a toku studio It will likely by some hybrid project. Also note the wiki article for Pi Production mentions they've done motion capture work. The preview for Final was done with motion capture. So this film is either more practice with motion capture or may have been the end goal all along.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Oct 27, 2013 10:09 am I'm expecting it to be some sort of preview for Final. (Note that the title is identical to that of the preview music) Personally, I don't really like the idea of any sort of "explanatory extra material", that would just cheapen a lot of things. In any case, any chance of possible Rei involvement has me both thrilled and terrified.
